MOTION (Notice Of) To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Mar-26-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF COREY COVINGTON COUNSEL'S, MOTION To Be Relieved As Counsel(FRANK MOORE)

APPEARANCES:FRANK MOORE,ESQ.415/292-6091-PETITIONER
KATHLEEN MAYLIN,ESQ. 415/394-9400( FOR SCHOOL DIST.BUT THE COURT DID NOT RECOGNIZE HER APPEARANCE ON GROUND COUNSEL DIDN'T FILE PAPERS, SHE WAS NOT ALLOWED TO OBSERVED DURING IN CAMERA SESSION.)
COREY COVINGTON (PLAINTIFF IN PROPER)

RULING; ARGUED and the Court TENTATIVELY GRANT THE MOTION TO BE RELIEVED ON THE FOLLOWING CONDITIONS.
1. THAT MR. MOORE,SHALL OBTAIN STIPULATION FROM THE DEFT.(SCHOOL DIST), CONTINUING THE MOTION FOR CONSOLIDATION AT LEAST 60 TO 90 DAYS.
2. FAILURE TO OBTAIN SUCH STIPULATION, MR. MOORE TO SEEK CONTINUANCE AT LEAST 30 DAYS AS TO PENDING MOTION TO DISMISS SET FOR HEARING ON MAY 4, 2004. ONLY WHEN THESE CONDITIONS ARE MET THAT THE FINAL ORDER TO WITHDRAW WILL BE ISSUED. IN THE MEANTIME THE ORDER GRANTING THE MOTION IS TEMPORARY.
THE MATTER WAS HEARD THRU IN CAMERA SESSION AT THE JUDGE' CHAMBER. ALSO, THE TRANCRIPT FOR THIS HEARING ORDERED SEALED AND CANNOT BE RELEASED UNLESS COURT ORDER.(302/REQ/JU)BELDON YEE # 2647
